theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The user requested an immersive dark futuristic/cosmic theme, but explicitly avoiding generic purple. Archetype 5 provides the cinematic depth, grain, and high-end feel needed for a top-tier engineering portfolio. Deep space blues, obsidian blacks, and stellar contrast create a memorable, professional vibe suitable for an AI/ML Engineer.

typography.strategy: The 'Editorial Future' pairing: Wide Geometric Sans for headings, clean Sans for body, and Monospace for technical data points.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing + Asymmetric 'Bento' Grids. Extensive use of negative space to let the 3D canvas breathe.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] rounded-2xl

animations.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling with momentum. Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fades (y: 50 -> 0, opacity 0 -> 1).
animations.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-2), borders glow with accent color, text contrast increases.
animations.3d_scene: React Three Fiber canvas prominently in the Hero. Use floating particles (stars/dust) and an interactive cosmic object (like a glowing AI node sphere) that reacts to mouse coordinates via useFrame.

ui_elements.buttons: Glassmorphic buttons with an inner 1px border. Hover state triggers a glow effect.
ui_elements.cards: Neumorphic dark glass. Use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle ambient glow on hover.
ui_elements.skills_marquee: Infinite smooth drift of technical skills. Font mono or massive sans, opacity-20 to act as a moving texture.

image_urls.description: Vibrant cosmic nebula. Can be used as an overlay texture for deep space aesthetics.
Abstract neural network layout. Ideal for the 'Data Wizard' project card background.
Dark data dashboard interface. Ideal for the 'Spendify' project card.
Abstract digital circuits. Ideal for the 'Trippy Trip' project card.

media_and_images.image_treatment: All images must feature a heavy gradient overlay (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-[#020617] to-transparent) to ensure the text remains legible while fitting the dark cosmic theme.

instructions_to_main_agent.1_setup: Use standard React (.js). Install Tailwind and required libraries: @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three framer-motion @studio-freight/react-lenis lucide-react react-fast-marquee.
instructions_to_main_agent.2_layout: Wrap the App in the Lenis scroller. Create a fixed navbar with backdrop-blur. Include all social links and a clear 'Download Resume' PDF button.
instructions_to_main_agent.3_3d_hero: Implement an R3F `<Canvas>` as the hero background. Use `<Stars />` and an interactive 3D object (a glowing sphere or node structure) representing AI/ML models that rotates based on mouse position.
instructions_to_main_agent.4_sections: Build 'About', 'Skills' (using react-fast-marquee), 'Projects' (using Bento grid logic), 'Achievements', and 'Experience' sections. Ensure 3D aesthetic continuity (dark space, glassmorphic cards).
instructions_to_main_agent.5_contact: Develop a functional contact form utilizing Resend (via an API endpoint in your server logic). Design inputs with high-contrast active/focus states.
instructions_to_main_agent.6_testing: Ensure EVERY interactive element has a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='resume-download-btn'`, `data-testid='contact-submit-btn'`).
instructions_to_main_agent.7_styling: CRITICAL: AVOID generic purple gradients entirely. Stick to `#020617` (Deep Obsidian Blue), Starlight Silver, and Cyan/Gold accents.
